ticket_text: My laptop won't turn on. I've tried holding the power button for 30 seconds but nothing happens. The charging light is not on either.
I can't connect to the VPN from home. It keeps timing out after 30 seconds. Other internet sites work fine.
URGENT: Our entire sales team (50 people) cannot access Salesforce or any internal apps. Started 10 minutes ago.
I forgot my password and now my account is locked out after too many attempts. I have a client presentation in 1 hour.
Excel keeps crashing when I open large spreadsheets (>50MB). It was working fine last week before the Office update.
I received a suspicious email claiming to be from IT asking me to verify my credentials. The link looks phishy.
Need to set up MFA for our new contractor accounts. We have 15 contractors starting next Monday.
Teams calls keep dropping after 5 minutes. Audio quality is also very poor with constant crackling.
Our Azure DevOps pipeline has been failing for the last 3 builds. The error mentions a certificate expiration on the build agent.
Can I get a second monitor for my desk? I work with multiple spreadsheets and it would improve productivity.
